title: Concurrency-Safe Implementation
description: Implement logic that is correct under concurrent access.
content:
Implement the following with correct behavior under concurrency: {{task}}

In {{language}}:
- Identify the shared state and the exact invariants that must hold.
- Choose the simplest correct synchronization (immutability > message passing > locks).
- Avoid deadlocks and races; explain why your choice is free of both.
- Note the performance trade-off you made.

Provide the code plus a short paragraph on how it behaves under contention.
